example.zh: 起飞前关上舷窗遮光板。

teachingExamples.en: Clouds filled the window during the flight.
teachingExamples.zh: 飞行中窗外满是云。

example.en: Can I get a window seat?
example.zh: 能给我靠窗座位吗？

example.en: Adjust your window shade gently.
example.zh: 轻轻调节舷窗遮光板。

example.en: Fasten your belt during takeoff.
example.zh: 起飞时请系好安全带。

teachingExamples.en: The sign says fasten your seat belt.
teachingExamples.zh: 指示灯提示系好安全带。

example.en: Click your seat belt tight.
example.zh: 把安全带扣紧。

example.en: Crew ask you to fasten your belt.
example.zh: 乘务员请你系好安全带。

example.en: Put your tray table up now.
example.zh: 现在收起小桌板。

teachingExamples.en: My meal sits on the tray.
teachingExamples.zh: 我的餐食放在小桌板上。

example.en: Stow your tray table for landing.
example.zh: 降落前收起小桌板。

example.en: May I have an extra pillow?
example.zh: 能再给一个枕头吗？

teachingExamples.en: The pillow helped me sleep.
teachingExamples.zh: 枕头帮我睡着了。

example.en: I used a neck pillow on the flight.
example.zh: 飞机上我用了颈枕。

example.en: The cabin feels cold; I need a blanket.
example.zh: 客舱有点冷，我需要毛毯。

teachingExamples.en: Blankets are free on long flights.
teachingExamples.zh: 长途航班毛毯免费。

example.en: She asked for a warm blanket.
example.zh: 她要了一条保暖毛毯。

example.en: Plug in your headset for the movie.
example.zh: 插上耳机看电影。

teachingExamples.en: This headset has noise canceling.
teachingExamples.zh: 这副耳机有降噪功能。

example.en: Wear a headset if you watch TV.
example.zh: 看电视请戴耳机。

example.en: Chicken or beef for the meal?
example.zh: 餐食要鸡肉还是牛肉？

teachingExamples.en: Meal service starts after takeoff.
teachingExamples.zh: 起飞后开始发餐。

example.en: This airline serves hot in-flight meals.
example.zh: 这家航空公司供应热食。

example.en: Please pick your meal choice now.
example.zh: 请选择餐食。

example.en: Stay seated during takeoff.
example.zh: 起飞时请留在座位上。

teachingExamples.en: Takeoff was smooth this morning.
teachingExamples.zh: 今早起飞很平稳。

example.en: Phones must be off before takeoff.
example.zh: 起飞前手机必须关机。

example.en: The landing was a little bumpy.
example.zh: 降落有点颠簸。

teachingExamples.en: Put seats upright before landing.
teachingExamples.zh: 降落前调直座椅靠背。

example.en: Pilots aim for a smooth landing.
example.zh: 飞行员力求平稳降落。

example.en: We hit turbulence over the mountains.
example.zh: 飞越山区时遇到颠簸。

teachingExamples.en: Please stay seated during turbulence.
teachingExamples.zh: 颠簸时请留在座位上。

example.en: Clear-air turbulence can surprise you.
example.zh: 晴空颠簸可能突如其来。

example.en: We are flying at high altitude.
example.zh: 我们正在高空飞行。

example.en: The plane climbed to cruising altitude.
example.zh: 飞机爬升到巡航高度。

teachingExamples.en: At this altitude it feels colder.
teachingExamples.zh: 在这个高度会感觉更冷。

example.en: We reached cruising altitude after twenty minutes.
example.zh: 二十分钟后到达巡航高度。

example.en: High altitude can cause ear pressure.
example.zh: 高空可能引起耳压不适。

example.en: Do you need a visa for transit?
example.zh: 过境需要签证吗？

teachingExamples.en: We stayed in the transit area only.
teachingExamples.zh: 我们只待在过境区。

example.en: My bags are still in transit.
example.zh: 我的行李还在运输途中。

example.en: Transit passengers follow yellow signs.
example.zh: 过境旅客按黄色指示牌走。

example.en: We have a tight connection in Dubai.
example.zh: 我们在迪拜转机时间很紧。

teachingExamples.en: Hurry or you will miss your connection.
teachingExamples.zh: 快点，不然会误衔接航班。

example.en: The delay made us miss our connection.
example.zh: 延误让我们误了衔接航班。

example.en: Your connecting flight leaves from Gate 9.
example.zh: 你的衔接航班从9号登机口出发。

example.en: We have a three-hour layover in Seoul.
example.zh: 我们在首尔中转停留三小时。

teachingExamples.en: During the layover I bought snacks.
teachingExamples.zh: 中转时我买了零食。

example.en: A long layover lets you leave the airport.
example.zh: 长时间中转可以离开机场。

example.en: We queued at immigration after landing.
example.zh: 落地后我们在入境处排队。

teachingExamples.en: Have your passport ready at immigration.
teachingExamples.zh: 在入境处准备好护照。

example.en: The immigration officer asked simple questions.
example.zh: 入境官员问了几个简单问题。

example.en: Follow signs to the immigration hall.
example.zh: 按指示牌前往入境大厅。

example.en: She put an entry stamp in my passport.
example.zh: 她在我的护照上盖了入境章。

example.en: Please stamp this form at the desk.
example.zh: 请在柜台在这张表上盖章。

teachingExamples.en: Check the date on your stamp.
teachingExamples.zh: 核对章上的日期。

example.en: An entry stamp shows your arrival date.
example.zh: 入境章显示到达日期。

example.en: I collect passport stamps from each trip.
example.zh: 我收集每次旅行的护照章。

example.en: Please collect your baggage after immigration.
example.zh: 入境后请领取行李。

teachingExamples.en: Baggage may arrive on the next flight.
teachingExamples.zh: 行李可能下一班航班才到。

example.en: Follow signs to baggage claim.
example.zh: 按指示牌去行李领取处。

example.en: Checked baggage has a weight limit.
example.zh: 托运行李有重量限制。

example.en: Baggage claim is downstairs.
example.zh: 行李领取处在楼下。

teachingExamples.en: Wait at carousel 3 in baggage claim.
teachingExamples.zh: 在行李领取处3号转盘等候。

example.en: We met at baggage claim.
example.zh: 我们在行李领取处见面。

example.en: Keep your claim tag safe.
example.zh: 保管好行李条。

example.en: Our bags appear on carousel 5.
example.zh: 我们的行李在5号转盘出来。

teachingExamples.en: Watch the carousel for your suitcase.
teachingExamples.zh: 在转盘旁留意你的行李箱。

example.en: The baggage carousel stopped suddenly.
example.zh: 行李转盘突然停了。

example.en: Grab a trolley for heavy bags.
example.zh: 重行李用行李推车。

teachingExamples.en: Trolleys are free near the exit.
teachingExamples.zh: 出口附近有免费行李推车。

example.en: Return the luggage trolley after use.
example.zh: 用完请归还行李推车。

example.en: Airport trolleys are near the doors.
example.zh: 机场门口有行李推车。

example.en: Follow the green signs to the exit.
example.zh: 跟着绿色指示牌到出口。

teachingExamples.en: Do not use the exit marked staff only.
teachingExamples.zh: 不要走标有“员工专用”的出口。

example.en: Know where the emergency exit is.
example.zh: 要知道紧急出口在哪。

example.en: Taxis wait outside the exit gate.
example.zh: 出租车在出口外等候。

chapters.title: 酒店住宿
chapters.scenario: 终于到了目的地，你需要办理酒店入住手续。

senses.meaning: 供旅客住宿的旅馆或酒店（本关核心义）

example.en: We found a quiet hotel near the train station for our first night.
example.zh: 我们头一晚在火车站附近找了一家安静的酒店。

example.en: She has worked in the hotel business for about ten years.
example.zh: 她从事酒店业大约十年了。

teachingExamples.en: The hotel gave us a map of the old town at the front desk.
teachingExamples.zh: 酒店在前台给了我们一张古镇地图。

teachingExamples.en: This family hotel has only twelve rooms, so book early.
teachingExamples.zh: 这家家庭式酒店只有十二间房，所以要早点预订。

example.en: We need to check into a hotel before the evening train leaves.
example.zh: 我们得在晚班火车开走前办理酒店入住。

example.en: The hotel staff brought extra towels to our room in five minutes.
example.zh: 酒店员工五分钟内就给我们房间多拿了毛巾。

senses.meaning: 已预订的房间或桌位等（本关：订房）

example.en: I have a reservation in your name for two nights, starting today.
example.zh: 我以您的名义预订了两晚，从今天开始。

example.en: He accepted the plan but still had some reservations about the price.
example.zh: 他接受了方案，但对价格仍有些保留。

teachingExamples.en: Please tell me your reservation code when you reach the front desk.
teachingExamples.zh: 到前台时请告诉我您的预订确认码。

example.en: You should make a reservation online because weekends are very busy.
example.zh: 你应该在网上预订，因为周末非常忙。

example.en: I called this morning to confirm a reservation for Friday night.
example.zh: 我今天早上打电话确认周五晚上的预订。

senses.meaning: 酒店入口处的公共等候区（本关核心义）

example.en: We waited in the lobby while the reception finished checking in another guest.
example.zh: 前台还在给另一位客人办入住时，我们在大堂等候。

example.en: The environmental lobby pushed for stricter rules last year.
example.zh: 环保游说团体去年推动更严格的法规。

teachingExamples.en: The lobby has free coffee, sofas, and a small business corner.
teachingExamples.zh: 大堂有免费咖啡、沙发和一处小型商务角。

example.en: Meet your driver in the hotel lobby near the main entrance.
example.zh: 在主入口附近的酒店大堂见你的司机。

senses.meaning: 酒店前台接待处（本关核心义）

example.en: Please go to reception on the ground floor with your passport ready.
example.zh: 请带好护照到一楼前台办理。

example.en: There will be a short reception for new guests at seven tonight.
example.zh: 今晚七点将为新客人举办一个简单的招待会。

teachingExamples.en: The reception desk is open twenty-four hours every single day.
teachingExamples.zh: 前台柜台全年无休，每天二十四小时开放。

teachingExamples.en: She works at reception and helps guests with taxis and maps.
teachingExamples.zh: 她在前台工作，帮客人叫车和看地图。

example.en: Our bags are still at the reception desk behind the glass screen.
example.zh: 我们的包还在玻璃屏风后的前台柜台。

example.en: If you lose your key card, just ask at reception for a new one.
example.zh: 如果你丢了房卡，到前台要一张新的就行。

senses.meaning: 办理退房离店（本关：时间与手续）

example.en: Checkout is at eleven, but late checkout may be possible for a small fee.
example.zh: 退房时间是十一点，但付一点费用或许可以延迟退房。

senses.meaning: 超市收银台（另一常见义）

example.en: She paid at the checkout and then looked for a taxi outside.
example.zh: 她在收银台付款，然后到外面找出租车。

teachingExamples.en: Please return your key card to reception before checkout tomorrow.
teachingExamples.zh: 明天退房前请把房卡交回前台。

example.en: We asked for late checkout because our flight leaves after dinner.
example.zh: 我们申请延迟退房，因为航班在晚饭后才起飞。

example.en: The checkout time is printed on the paper inside your room folder.
example.zh: 退房时间印在你房间文件夹里的纸上。

relatedWords.meaning: 动词短语：结账离开；看看（多义）

senses.meaning: 酒店中带客厅等的套房（本关核心义）

example.en: They upgraded us to a corner suite with a view of the river.
example.zh: 他们把我们升级到一间能看江景的转角套房。

example.en: This software suite includes tools for email, notes, and calendars.
example.zh: 这套软件包含邮件、笔记和日历等工具。

teachingExamples.en: The suite has a separate living room and a small kitchen area.
teachingExamples.zh: 这套房有独立客厅和一个小厨房区。

example.en: A junior suite costs a little more but offers much more space.
example.zh: 小套房贵一点，但空间大得多。

example.en: The hotel prepared flowers in the bridal suite before the wedding guests arrived.
example.zh: 婚礼客人到之前，酒店先在新婚套房里摆好了鲜花。

relatedWords.meaning: 带独立卫浴（常作形容词用）

senses.meaning: 把预订房型升到更高档（本关核心义）

example.en: The hotel offered us a free upgrade because our room was not ready yet.
example.zh: 因为我们的房间还没备好，酒店给了我们免费升级房型。

example.en: This phone needs an upgrade to run the new travel app smoothly.
example.zh: 这部手机需要升级才能顺畅运行新的旅行应用。

teachingExamples.en: We asked politely if an upgrade to a sea view was available tonight.
teachingExamples.zh: 我们礼貌地问今晚是否还有海景房可升级。

example.en: A room upgrade is not always free, so read the email offer carefully.
example.zh: 房型升级并不总是免费，所以要仔细阅读邮件里的说明。

senses.meaning: 只有一张单人床的房间（本关：房型）

example.en: I booked a single since I am travelling alone and need a quiet desk.
example.zh: 我订了单人间，因为独自出行，还需要一张安静的书桌。

example.en: He paid with a single banknote and took the receipt from reception.
example.zh: 他用一张纸币付款，然后从前台拿了收据。

teachingExamples.en: A single is cheaper than a double if you do not need two beds.
teachingExamples.zh: 如果你不需要两张床，单人间比双人间便宜。

example.en: Do you still have a single room available for tomorrow night only?
example.zh: 你们明晚还有单人房吗，只要一晚？

senses.meaning: 配一张双人床或两张单人床的房间（本关：房型）

example.en: We reserved a double for our parents and a single for our teenage son.
example.zh: 我们给父母订了双人间，给十几岁的儿子订了单人间。

example.en: The hotel applied a double charge by mistake, but fixed it quickly.
example.zh: 酒店误收了双倍费用，但很快纠正了。

teachingExamples.en: This double has two single beds, so we can share without sharing one mattress.
teachingExamples.zh: 这间双人间有两张单人床，我们可以分床而不挤一张床垫。

example.en: A double room on the top floor is quieter if you hate street noise.
example.zh: 如果你讨厌街噪，顶楼双人间通常更安静。

relatedWords.meaning: 常指两张单人床的双人间

senses.meaning: 入住时预授权或暂扣的押金（本关核心义）

example.en: The reception took a fifty-pound deposit on my card for possible room damage.
example.zh: 前台在我卡上暂扣五十英镑押金，以防房间损坏。

example.en: He keeps travel savings in a deposit account with low risk.
example.zh: 他把旅行积蓄放在风险较低的定期存款账户里。

teachingExamples.en: They will refund the deposit within seven days after you check out.
teachingExamples.zh: 你退房后七天内他们会退还押金。

teachingExamples.en: Please read how the deposit works before you sign the hotel form.
teachingExamples.zh: 签字前请先看清押金规则。

example.en: The hotel calls this fee a security deposit, not an extra room charge.
example.zh: 酒店称这笔费用为押金，而不是额外的房费。

example.en: Ask whether the deposit is refundable if you cancel one day early.
example.zh: 如果你提前一天取消，问问押金是否可退。

relatedWords.meaning: 预付款（语义相近但不完全等同）

example.en: The bathroom in this hotel room is very clean.
example.zh: 这间酒店客房的浴室很干净。

teachingExamples.en: Excuse me, where is the bathroom?
teachingExamples.zh: 打扰一下，请问卫生间在哪里？

example.en: We booked a room with a private bathroom.
example.zh: 我们订了一间带独立卫生间的房间。

example.en: I took a hot shower after the flight.
example.zh: 飞行后我冲了个热水澡。

example.en: I usually shower before breakfast.
example.zh: 我通常在早餐前洗澡。

teachingExamples.en: The shower in my room has strong water pressure.
teachingExamples.zh: 我房间里的淋浴水压很大。

example.en: I want to take a shower before going out.
example.zh: 我想出门前先洗个澡。

example.en: This suite has a large bathtub near the window.
example.zh: 这间套房在窗边有一个大浴缸。

teachingExamples.en: The child is playing with water in the bathtub.
teachingExamples.zh: 孩子正在浴缸里玩水。

example.en: Please fill the bathtub with warm water.
example.zh: 请给浴缸放温水。

example.en: Could you bring me a clean towel, please?
example.zh: 请给我拿一条干净毛巾好吗？

teachingExamples.en: There are two towels on the bathroom shelf.
teachingExamples.zh: 浴室架子上有两条毛巾。

example.en: I wrapped myself in a bath towel.
example.zh: 我用一条浴巾裹住了身体。

example.en: There is a bar of soap next to the sink.
example.zh: 洗手池旁边有一块肥皂。

teachingExamples.en: Use soap to wash your hands before eating.
teachingExamples.zh: 吃饭前请用肥皂洗手。

example.en: The hotel provides a bar of soap every day.
example.zh: 酒店每天都会提供一块肥皂。

example.en: The toilet in room 305 needs repair.
example.zh: 305 房间的马桶需要维修。

teachingExamples.en: Please flush the toilet after use.
teachingExamples.zh: 使用后请冲马桶。

example.en: Don't forget to flush the toilet.
example.zh: 别忘了冲马桶。

example.en: I checked my hair in the mirror.
example.zh: 我在镜子里检查了一下头发。

teachingExamples.en: There is a big mirror above the sink.
teachingExamples.zh: 洗手池上方有一面大镜子。

example.en: She looked in the mirror before leaving.
example.zh: 她出门前照了照镜子。

example.en: Put the juice in the refrigerator, please.
example.zh: 请把果汁放进冰箱里。

teachingExamples.en: Our room has a small refrigerator for drinks.
teachingExamples.zh: 我们的房间有一个放饮料的小冰箱。

example.en: The mini refrigerator is under the TV stand.
example.zh: 小冰箱在电视柜下面。

example.en: Could you turn on the heating? It's cold tonight.
example.zh: 你能打开暖气吗？今晚很冷。

teachingExamples.en: The heating in this apartment works well.
teachingExamples.zh: 这间公寓的供暖系统运行良好。

example.en: Please turn on the heating before bedtime.
example.zh: 睡前请把暖气打开。

example.en: I used the remote to change the TV channel.
example.zh: 我用遥控器换了电视频道。

teachingExamples.en: The remote is on the bedside table.
teachingExamples.zh: 遥控器在床头柜上。

example.en: This remote control can also adjust the air conditioner.
example.zh: 这个遥控器也可以调节空调。

example.en: Breakfast is served from 7 to 10 a.m. in the hotel restaurant.
example.zh: 酒店餐厅在早上7点到10点供应早餐。

example.en: We had breakfast before checking out.
example.zh: 我们在退房前吃了早餐。

teachingExamples.en: Is breakfast included in the room rate?
teachingExamples.zh: 房价包含早餐吗？

teachingExamples.en: Please tell me where breakfast is served.
teachingExamples.zh: 请告诉我早餐在哪里供应。

example.en: I booked a room with breakfast included.
example.zh: 我订了一个含早餐的房间。

example.en: The hotel offers a buffet breakfast every morning.
example.zh: 这家酒店每天早晨提供自助早餐。

senses.meaning: 酒店里提供信息与协助的礼宾员

example.en: The concierge helped us book a city tour.
example.zh: 礼宾员帮我们预订了城市观光。

teachingExamples.en: Ask the concierge for restaurant recommendations.
teachingExamples.zh: 向礼宾员咨询餐厅推荐吧。

example.en: You can leave your luggage at the concierge desk.
example.zh: 你可以把行李寄存在礼宾台。

example.en: The hotel concierge arranged an airport taxi for us.
example.zh: 酒店礼宾员为我们安排了去机场的出租车。

example.en: The hotel laundry can return your clothes by evening.
example.zh: 酒店洗衣服务可在晚上前把衣服送回。

example.en: I put my laundry in the bag for pickup.
example.zh: 我把待洗衣物放进袋子里等人来取。

teachingExamples.en: Do you have same-day laundry service?
teachingExamples.zh: 你们有当日洗衣服务吗？

example.en: Laundry service is available from 8 a.m. to 8 p.m.
example.zh: 洗衣服务供应时间是早上8点到晚上8点。

example.en: Please put your clothes in the laundry bag.
example.zh: 请把衣服放进洗衣袋。

senses.meaning: 酒店内供住客锻炼的健身房

example.en: The gym on the third floor is open 24 hours.
example.zh: 三楼的健身房24小时开放。

teachingExamples.en: Is the gym free for hotel guests?
teachingExamples.zh: 酒店住客使用健身房是免费的吗？

example.en: I used the hotel gym before breakfast.
example.zh: 我在早餐前用了酒店健身房。

example.en: Your room card gives you gym access.
example.zh: 你的房卡可让你进入健身房。

senses.meaning: 酒店内供住客游泳的泳池

example.en: The pool is on the rooftop with a city view.
example.zh: 游泳池在屋顶，可以看到城市景观。

teachingExamples.en: What time does the pool close tonight?
teachingExamples.zh: 今晚游泳池几点关闭？

example.en: The swimming pool is free for all guests.
example.zh: 游泳池对所有住客免费开放。

example.en: No food is allowed in the pool area.
example.zh: 泳池区域内不允许饮食。

senses.meaning: 酒店提供的停车区域或停车服务

example.en: The hotel offers free parking for guests.
example.zh: 这家酒店为住客提供免费停车。

teachingExamples.en: Do I need to reserve parking in advance?
teachingExamples.zh: 我需要提前预订停车位吗？

example.en: This room package includes free parking.
example.zh: 这个房间套餐包含免费停车。

example.en: The parking lot is behind the hotel building.
example.zh: 停车场在酒店大楼后面。

senses.meaning: 酒店提供的无线互联网连接

example.en: The wifi in my room is fast and stable.
example.zh: 我房间里的无线网络又快又稳定。

teachingExamples.en: Could you tell me the wifi password?
teachingExamples.zh: 可以告诉我无线网络密码吗？

teachingExamples.en: Is wifi included in the room price?
teachingExamples.zh: 房价里包含无线网络吗？

example.en: Please write the wifi password on this card.
example.zh: 请把无线网络密码写在这张卡上。

example.en: Most business hotels now provide free wifi.
example.zh: 大多数商务酒店现在都提供免费无线网络。

senses.meaning: 酒店中负责打扫与整理房间的服务部门

example.en: Housekeeping will clean your room this afternoon.
example.zh: 客房清洁今天下午会来打扫你的房间。

teachingExamples.en: Please call housekeeping for extra towels.
teachingExamples.zh: 请打电话给客房清洁要额外毛巾。

example.en: Daily housekeeping service starts at 9 a.m.
example.zh: 每日客房清洁服务从早上9点开始。

example.en: If you need blankets, call housekeeping.
example.zh: 如果你需要毛毯，请联系客房清洁。

senses.meaning: 酒店为住客提供的便利设施

example.en: The gym is a popular amenity in this hotel.
example.zh: 健身房是这家酒店很受欢迎的便利设施。

senses.meaning: 使住宿更舒适的附加条件

example.en: Free breakfast is a useful amenity for travellers.
example.zh: 免费早餐对旅行者来说是很实用的配套。

teachingExamples.en: What amenities are included in this room type?
teachingExamples.zh: 这种房型包含哪些便利设施？

example.en: The hotel amenities include a pool and free wifi.
example.zh: 酒店设施包括游泳池和免费无线网络。

example.en: A coffee machine is a useful in-room amenity.
example.zh: 咖啡机是很实用的客房内设施。

senses.meaning: 酒店员工为客人提供的帮助与接待

example.en: The service at this hotel is friendly and efficient.
example.zh: 这家酒店的服务友好且高效。

example.en: Laundry service is available on request.
example.zh: 可按需提供洗衣服务。

teachingExamples.en: I am very satisfied with the room service.
teachingExamples.zh: 我对客房服务很满意。

teachingExamples.en: Good service makes guests want to come back.
teachingExamples.zh: 优质服务会让客人愿意再来。

example.en: We ordered dinner through room service.
example.zh: 我们通过客房服务点了晚餐。

example.en: Please contact customer service if you have a complaint.
example.zh: 如果你有投诉，请联系客户服务。

example.en: Many guests praised the hotel for its excellent service.
example.zh: 很多客人因酒店的优质服务而称赞它。

example.en: Could I have the bill, please? I'm checking out now.
example.zh: 请把账单给我好吗？我现在要退房。

example.en: The bill lists the room rate and the minibar charges.
example.zh: 账单上列有房费和迷你吧费用。

teachingExamples.en: I'd like to settle the bill before I leave the hotel.
teachingExamples.zh: 我想在离开酒店前结清账单。

teachingExamples.en: They added breakfast to my final bill.
teachingExamples.zh: 他们把早餐记入了我的最终账单。

example.en: The company will foot the bill for the extra night.
example.zh: 多住一晚的费用由公司付账。

example.en: We decided to split the bill for the group dinner.
example.zh: 我们决定把集体晚餐的账单分摊。

example.en: Please send me an itemized bill for my expenses claim.
example.zh: 请给我一张分项明细账单，便于报销。

senses.meaning: 付款凭证（退房时可索要）

example.en: Always ask for a receipt after you pay at reception.
example.zh: 在前台付款后务必索要收据。

example.en: This email confirms receipt of your deposit.
example.zh: 此邮件确认已收到你的押金。

teachingExamples.en: Keep your receipt if you need a refund later.
teachingExamples.zh: 若之后需要退款，请保留好收据。

example.en: The receipt works as proof of purchase for the minibar.
example.zh: 这张收据可作为迷你吧消费的购买凭证。

example.en: The desk can print a receipt for the city tax.
example.zh: 前台可以打印城市税的收据。

example.en: There is a small charge for late checkout.
example.zh: 延迟退房会有一笔小额费用。

example.en: They charged 15 euros for parking overnight.
example.zh: 他们收取了过夜停车费15欧元。

teachingExamples.en: Please explain each charge on my folio.
teachingExamples.zh: 请解释一下我账单上的每一项费用。

teachingExamples.en: The hotel charged my card on departure.
teachingExamples.zh: 酒店在我离店时从我的卡上扣款。

example.en: A 10% service charge was added to the bill.
example.zh: 账单上加收了10%的服务费。

example.en: I paid a late checkout charge to keep the room until 2 p.m.
example.zh: 我付了延迟退房费，把房间延到下午两点。

example.en: Wi-Fi for multiple devices may carry an extra charge.
example.zh: 多台设备使用Wi-Fi可能额外收费。

example.en: I received a full refund for the cancelled tour.
example.zh: 取消的行程我拿到了全额退款。

example.en: The hotel agreed to refund the deposit to my card.
example.zh: 酒店同意把押金退回到我的卡上。

teachingExamples.en: How long will the refund take to show on my account?
teachingExamples.zh: 退款多久会显示在我的账户上？

example.en: You are entitled to a full refund if the service fails.
example.zh: 若服务未达标，你有权获得全额退款。

example.en: I had to request a refund for the duplicate minibar charge.
example.zh: 我不得不为重复的迷你吧扣款申请退款。

relatedWords.meaning: 押金（退款对象常与之相关）

example.en: In some countries you leave a tip for housekeeping.
example.zh: 在有些国家你要给客房服务留小费。

example.en: We tipped the porter who carried our bags.
example.zh: 我们给搬运行李的门童付了小费。

teachingExamples.en: Is service included, or should I add a tip?
teachingExamples.zh: 服务费已含在内吗，还是需要另付小费？

teachingExamples.en: She tipped the concierge for calling a taxi.
teachingExamples.zh: 她因门童帮忙叫车而给了小费。

example.en: Please leave a tip in the envelope on the desk if you wish.
example.zh: 如愿意，请把小额小费放在桌上的信封里。

example.en: The menu says tip included for the set dinner.
example.zh: 套餐菜单上写着小费已含。

relatedWords.meaning: 服务费（不一定等同小费）

example.en: I made a complaint about the noise from the street.
example.zh: 我因街道噪音向酒店提出了投诉。

teachingExamples.en: The manager handled my complaint very professionally.
teachingExamples.zh: 经理非常专业地处理了我的投诉。

teachingExamples.en: File a complaint if the room was not as described.
teachingExamples.zh: 若房间与描述不符，可以正式投诉。

example.en: You can lodge a complaint at the front desk.
example.zh: 你可以在前台正式提出投诉。

example.en: She filled out a complaint form at checkout.
example.zh: 她在退房时填写了投诉表。

example.en: The hotel emailed me a link to leave feedback.
example.zh: 酒店给我发了邮件链接留评价。

example.en: We value your feedback to improve our service.
example.zh: 我们重视您的反馈以改进服务。

teachingExamples.en: Could you give us some quick feedback before you go?
teachingExamples.zh: 离开前能给我们留几句简短反馈吗？

example.en: Customer feedback helps the hotel fix recurring issues.
example.zh: 客户反馈帮助酒店解决反复出现的问题。

example.en: There is a feedback form in every room.
example.zh: 每间客房里都放有意见表。

example.en: I asked for a one-day extension of my stay.
example.zh: 我申请把住宿延长一天。

teachingExamples.en: The front desk approved a two-hour extension for late checkout.
teachingExamples.zh: 前台批准延迟退房多住两小时。

example.en: A room extension may change your nightly rate.
example.zh: 续房可能会改变每晚房价。

example.en: Visa rules may limit your extension of stay abroad.
example.zh: 签证规定可能限制你在国外延长停留。

relatedWords.meaning: 退房（时间点与续住相关）

example.en: Don't forget to return your key card when you check out.
example.zh: 退房时别忘了交还房卡。

teachingExamples.en: My key card stopped working on the last night.
teachingExamples.zh: 最后一晚我的房卡突然刷不开了。

teachingExamples.en: He tapped the key card on the reader to open the door.
teachingExamples.zh: 他把房卡在感应器上刷了一下开门。

example.en: You need to swipe a key card at the lift for your floor.
example.zh: 你需要在电梯里刷房卡才能到你住的楼层。

example.en: I had to replace a key card after I lost mine.
example.zh: 房卡丢了之后我不得不补办一张。

relatedWords.meaning: 词序易混（标准说法为 key card）

example.en: We left our baggage with the concierge after checkout.
example.zh: 退房后我们把行李寄存在礼宾部。

teachingExamples.en: The hotel can store your baggage for a few hours free of charge.
teachingExamples.zh: 酒店可以免费寄存行李几小时。

example.en: After checkout we went to baggage claim at the airport.
example.zh: 退房后我们去了机场的行李领取处。

example.en: Check excess baggage fees before you fly home.
example.zh: 回国乘机前先查超重行李费用。

example.en: Keep valuables in your hand baggage, not in the hold.
example.zh: 贵重物品放在手提行李里，不要托运。

chapters.title: 交通出行
chapters.scenario: 在陌生城市，你需要搞懂各种交通方式。

example.en: We took a taxi to the hotel.
example.zh: 我们乘出租车去了酒店。

senses.meaning: 类似小型出租车的服务

example.en: The taxi stand is near the exit.
example.zh: 出租车站台在出口附近。

teachingExamples.en: How much is a taxi to the station?
teachingExamples.zh: 到火车站出租车要多少钱？

teachingExamples.en: Please call a taxi for us.
teachingExamples.zh: 请帮我们叫一辆出租车。

example.en: Let's take a taxi because it's raining.
example.zh: 下雨了，我们坐出租车吧。

example.en: Wait at the taxi rank outside the mall.
example.zh: 在商场外的出租车站等。

example.en: We went there by taxi.
example.zh: 我们是坐出租车去的。

relatedWords.meaning: 公共汽车（不同交通工具）

example.en: The bus comes every ten minutes.
example.zh: 公交车每十分钟一班。

example.en: We took the night bus to another city.
example.zh: 我们坐夜班大巴去了另一座城市。

teachingExamples.en: Which bus goes to the museum?
teachingExamples.zh: 哪路公交去博物馆？

teachingExamples.en: Get off at the next bus stop.
teachingExamples.zh: 在下一站下车。

example.en: There is a bus stop in front of the park.
example.zh: 公园前面有一个公交车站。

example.en: Hurry, or we will miss the bus.
example.zh: 快点，不然我们要错过这班车了。

example.en: I go to work by bus every day.
example.zh: 我每天乘公交上班。

example.en: The subway is fast in this city.
example.zh: 这座城市的地铁很快。

example.en: Use the subway to cross the busy road.
example.zh: 走地下通道穿过繁忙的马路。

teachingExamples.en: Where is the nearest subway station?
teachingExamples.zh: 最近的地铁站在哪里？

teachingExamples.en: We change lines at the next subway stop.
teachingExamples.zh: 我们在下一站地铁换乘。

example.en: Meet me at the subway station gate.
example.zh: 在地铁站入口见我。

example.en: Let's take the subway to the airport.
example.zh: 我们坐地铁去机场吧。

example.en: Line 2 is the newest subway line here.
example.zh: 2号线是这里最新的地铁线。

example.en: Our train leaves at six.
example.zh: 我们的火车六点出发。

example.en: This train stops at every small town.
example.zh: 这列火车每个小镇都停。

teachingExamples.en: Is this the right train to Paris?
teachingExamples.zh: 这是去巴黎的火车吗？

teachingExamples.en: The train is late because of snow.
teachingExamples.zh: 因为下雪火车晚点了。

example.en: The hotel is five minutes from the train station.
example.zh: 酒店离火车站五分钟路程。

example.en: We ran to catch the train.
example.zh: 我们跑着去赶火车。

example.en: We travel by train when we tour Europe.
example.zh: 在欧洲旅游时我们乘火车出行。

example.en: Exit the station and turn left.
example.zh: 出站后向左转。

example.en: The station has many shops inside.
example.zh: 车站里有很多商店。

teachingExamples.en: Which exit is near the city centre?
teachingExamples.zh: 哪个出口离市中心近？

teachingExamples.en: The station opens at five in the morning.
teachingExamples.zh: 车站早上五点开门。

example.en: We met at the railway station.
example.zh: 我们在火车站见面。

example.en: The police station is next to the park.
example.zh: 警察局在公园旁边。

example.en: I will wait for you at the station.
example.zh: 我在车站等你。

senses.meaning: 火车/地铁乘客上下车的站台

example.en: Your train leaves from platform 3.
example.zh: 你的火车从3号站台开出。

senses.meaning: 高出的平台（交通外义，略用）

example.en: Stand behind the yellow line on the platform.
example.zh: 站在站台黄线后面。

teachingExamples.en: Do not run on the platform.
teachingExamples.zh: 不要在站台上奔跑。

teachingExamples.en: The sign shows the next platform.
teachingExamples.zh: 指示牌显示下一个站台。

example.en: Check the platform number on the screen.
example.zh: 在屏幕上查看站台号。

example.en: We wait on the platform for five minutes.
example.zh: 我们在站台等了五分钟。

example.en: You must change platform for the express.
example.zh: 坐快车你要换站台。

example.en: Check the schedule before you leave the hotel.
example.zh: 离开酒店前先查时刻表。

example.en: Today's schedule is quite full.
example.zh: 今天的安排很满。

teachingExamples.en: Where can I find the bus schedule?
teachingExamples.zh: 哪里能查到公交车时刻表？

teachingExamples.en: The schedule changes on Sunday.
teachingExamples.zh: 周日时刻表会变。

example.en: Download the train schedule online.
example.zh: 在网上下载列车时刻表。

example.en: The bus arrived on schedule.
example.zh: 公交车准时到达。

example.en: We finished ahead of schedule.
example.zh: 我们提前完成了。

senses.meaning: 乘坐交通工具应付的费用

example.en: The bus fare is two pounds.
example.zh: 公交车票价是两英镑。

example.en: Ask the driver about the taxi fare.
example.zh: 向司机问一下出租车费用。

teachingExamples.en: How much is the fare to the airport?
teachingExamples.zh: 到机场的车费是多少？

teachingExamples.en: Students get a cheaper fare on the subway.
teachingExamples.zh: 学生乘地铁票价更便宜。

example.en: A single fare is enough for today.
example.zh: 今天买单程票就行。

example.en: Children under five do not pay full fare.
example.zh: 五岁以下儿童不用付全价。

example.en: Pay at the fare machine near the gate.
example.zh: 在闸机旁的售票机付款。

example.en: This route goes through the old town.
example.zh: 这条线路经过老城。

example.en: Draw the walking route on the map.
example.zh: 在地图上画出步行路线。

teachingExamples.en: Which route is faster at rush hour?
teachingExamples.zh: 高峰时段哪条路线更快？

teachingExamples.en: The app shows the best bus route.
teachingExamples.zh: 应用显示最佳公交路线。

example.en: Bus route 12 stops near our hotel.
example.zh: 12路公交在我们酒店附近停靠。

example.en: We took the scenic route by the river.
example.zh: 我们选了沿河的风景路线。

example.en: The driver had to change route because of road work.
example.zh: 因为修路司机不得不改路线。

example.en: You need one transfer to reach the museum.
example.zh: 到博物馆需要换乘一次。

example.en: Transfer to the airport bus at this stop.
example.zh: 在这一站换乘机场巴士。

teachingExamples.en: Where do I transfer to Line 4?
teachingExamples.zh: 我在哪里换乘4号线？

teachingExamples.en: A free transfer saves money in this city.
teachingExamples.zh: 在这座城市免费换乘能省钱。

example.en: Get off at the transfer station and follow the signs.
example.zh: 在换乘站下车并跟着指示牌走。

example.en: This ticket allows a free transfer within one hour.
example.zh: 这张票一小时内可免费换乘。

example.en: You transfer to the express train here.
example.zh: 你在这里换乘快车。

example.en: We picked up our rental at the airport counter.
example.zh: 我们在机场柜台取了租的车。

teachingExamples.en: Does the rental include unlimited mileage?
teachingExamples.zh: 租车费用包含不限里程吗？

example.en: I booked a car rental for our road trip.
example.zh: 我为公路旅行订了租车。

example.en: Show your driver's license when you collect the car.
example.zh: 取车时要出示驾照。

example.en: You need a parking permit or a valid license plate.
example.zh: 你需要停车许可或有效车牌。

teachingExamples.en: My license expires next month; I need to renew it.
teachingExamples.zh: 我的驾照下个月到期，需要续期。

example.en: International travelers should carry a driver's license.
example.zh: 国际旅客应随身携带驾驶证。

example.en: Traffic was heavy on the highway leaving the city.
example.zh: 驶离市区时高速公路车流量很大。

teachingExamples.en: We got stuck in traffic and missed the ferry.
teachingExamples.zh: 我们堵在路上，错过了渡轮。

example.en: A traffic jam added an hour to the drive.
example.zh: 堵车让车程多花了一小时。

senses.meaning: 干线公路；（常指）高速公路

example.en: We merged onto the highway and headed north.
example.zh: 我们并入高速公路向北行驶。

teachingExamples.en: Rest stops along the highway sell snacks and coffee.
teachingExamples.zh: 公路沿途的服务区卖零食和咖啡。

example.en: Take the next highway exit toward the coast.
example.zh: 从下一个高速出口开往海边。

relatedWords.meaning: 人行道（与道路类型不同，易混场景词）

example.en: Keep your speed steady in wet weather.
example.zh: 雨天要保持车速稳定。

example.en: The car speeds up smoothly on the ramp.
example.zh: 车在匝道上平稳加速。

teachingExamples.en: What is the average speed on this route?
teachingExamples.zh: 这条路线的平均车速是多少？

example.en: The speed limit drops near the school zone.
example.zh: 靠近学校区域时限速会降低。

example.en: There is a strict limit on blood alcohol while driving.
example.zh: 驾车时血液酒精浓度有严格上限。

teachingExamples.en: Know the speed limit before you enter the tunnel.
teachingExamples.zh: 进隧道前要先了解限速。

example.en: You can detour, but only within reasonable limits.
example.zh: 可以绕行，但要在合理范围内。

example.en: Overnight parking at the trailhead requires a permit.
example.zh: 在步道起点过夜停车需要许可证。

teachingExamples.en: We found street parking two blocks from the viewpoint.
teachingExamples.zh: 我们在观景点两个街区外找到了路边停车位。

example.en: The scenic overlook has a small parking lot.
example.zh: 观景台有一个小停车场。

example.en: The fuel gauge was low, so we stopped at a station.
example.zh: 油表很低，所以我们在加油站停了。

example.en: They fueled the van before crossing the desert.
example.zh: 他们在穿越沙漠前给面包车加满了油。

teachingExamples.en: Does this rental require premium fuel?
teachingExamples.zh: 这辆租车需要加高标号汽油吗？

example.en: Pay inside before you use the fuel pump.
example.zh: 使用加油枪前先在室内付款。

example.en: Download an offline map before driving into the mountains.
example.zh: 开车进山前要下载离线地图。

teachingExamples.en: The rental desk gave us a paper map of scenic routes.
teachingExamples.zh: 租车柜台给了我们一张景观公路的纸质地图。

example.en: A road map helps when GPS has no signal.
example.zh: GPS 没信号时公路图很有用。

example.en: The toll booth accepts cards and cash.
example.zh: 收费站接受刷卡和现金。

teachingExamples.en: We budgeted extra money for highway tolls.
teachingExamples.zh: 我们多预算了一些高速公路通行费。

example.en: The toll road saved us time on a busy holiday.
example.zh: 繁忙假日走收费公路帮我们省了时间。

senses.meaning: 用于载运人车过河的船舶

example.en: We took the ferry across the river.
example.zh: 我们乘渡船过河。

example.en: The ferry runs every hour.
example.zh: 渡轮每小时一班。

teachingExamples.en: The car ferry leaves at dawn.
teachingExamples.zh: 汽车渡轮黎明开航。

example.en: Meet me at the ferry terminal.
example.zh: 在渡轮码头见我。

senses.meaning: 水上用桨或马达推动的小型船只

example.en: They rowed the boat to the island.
example.zh: 他们划船到岛上。

teachingExamples.en: Rent a boat for the afternoon.
teachingExamples.zh: 租一条船度过下午。

example.en: We went by boat.
example.zh: 我们乘船去的。

senses.meaning: 船只停靠装卸的港口城市或水域

example.en: The ship arrived at the port.
example.zh: 船抵达港口。

example.en: Turn to port.
example.zh: 向左舷转。

teachingExamples.en: Fresh fish is sold at the port market.
teachingExamples.zh: 新鲜鱼在港口市场出售。

example.en: Singapore was our last port of call.
example.zh: 新加坡是我们最后一站停靠港。

example.en: Fishing boats lined the dock.
example.zh: 渔船排满码头。

example.en: The ferry will dock in ten minutes.
example.zh: 渡轮十分钟后靠岸。

teachingExamples.en: Workers loaded crates at the dock.
teachingExamples.zh: 工人在码头装货箱。

example.en: The ship entered dry dock for repairs.
example.zh: 船进干坞维修。

example.en: They booked a cruise to Norway.
example.zh: 他们订了去挪威的游轮旅行。

example.en: The car cruised along the coast.
example.zh: 汽车沿海岸平稳行驶。

teachingExamples.en: Sunset Cruise departs at six.
teachingExamples.zh: 日落巡游六点出发。

example.en: The cruise ship has ten decks.
example.zh: 这艘邮轮有十层甲板。

senses.meaning: 船或飞机上的隔间、舱位

example.en: Our cabin is on deck five.
example.zh: 我们的舱房在五层甲板。

example.en: They stayed in a mountain cabin.
example.zh: 他们住在山间小木屋。

teachingExamples.en: Book an ocean-view cabin early.
teachingExamples.zh: 尽早预订海景舱。

example.en: The cabin crew demonstrated safety belts.
example.zh: 客舱人员演示安全带。

senses.meaning: 船的各层露天或覆盖平台

example.en: Passengers gathered on the upper deck.
example.zh: 乘客聚集在上层甲板。

senses.meaning: 类似结构的一层（如巴士上层）

example.en: Sit on the top deck of the bus.
example.zh: 坐在巴士上层。

teachingExamples.en: Lifeboats hang along the deck.
teachingExamples.zh: 救生艇沿甲板悬挂。

example.en: Chairs filled the sun deck.
example.zh: 日光甲板上摆满躺椅。

relatedWords.meaning: 码头（拼写相近场景不同）

senses.meaning: 乘坐公共交通工具的人

example.en: All passengers must show tickets.
example.zh: 所有乘客须出示车票。

teachingExamples.en: The ferry carries 200 passengers.
teachingExamples.zh: 这艘渡轮可载200名乘客。

example.en: She sat in the passenger seat.
example.zh: 她坐在副驾驶座。

example.en: We sail at high tide.
example.zh: 我们在涨潮时启航。

example.en: The wind filled the sail.
example.zh: 风鼓满船帆。

teachingExamples.en: Learn to sail before the trip.
teachingExamples.zh: 出行前先学驾帆船。

example.en: The fleet will set sail tomorrow.
example.zh: 舰队明日启航。

example.en: They dropped anchor in the bay.
example.zh: 他们在海湾抛锚。

example.en: Good friends anchor your life.
example.zh: 好友是你人生的支柱。

teachingExamples.en: The anchor holds well in mud.
teachingExamples.zh: 锚在泥底抓得牢。

example.en: Ships lay at anchor overnight.
example.zh: 船只整夜停泊。

senses.meaning: 两轮脚踏车（城市短程出行）

example.en: We rented bicycles to tour the old town today.
example.zh: 我们今天租了自行车逛老城。

senses.meaning: 日常短途骑行的代步工具

example.en: Many locals use a bicycle for short trips each day.
example.zh: 许多当地人每天用自行车短途出行。

teachingExamples.en: The hotel lends guests a bicycle for free.
teachingExamples.zh: 酒店免费借给客人一辆自行车。

teachingExamples.en: Lock your bicycle near the train station gate.
teachingExamples.zh: 把你的自行车锁在火车站口附近。

example.en: You can rent a bicycle by the harbor.
example.zh: 你可以在港口边租自行车。

example.en: Stay in the bicycle lane on busy roads.
example.zh: 车多时要走在自行车道里。

senses.meaning: 电动或踢踏式小型两轮车（景区、市区常见）

example.en: Many tourists use a scooter along the seafront.
example.zh: 许多游客沿着海滨骑小型滑板车。

senses.meaning: 轻便摩托车（英式有时指 moped 类）

example.en: He rides a scooter to beat the morning traffic.
example.zh: 他骑小摩托躲开早高峰堵车。

teachingExamples.en: Check local rules before you rent a scooter abroad.
teachingExamples.zh: 在国外租滑板车前先查当地规定。

teachingExamples.en: Park the scooter in the marked area only.
teachingExamples.zh: 请只把滑板车停在划线区域。

example.en: An electric scooter saved us a long walk to the gate.
example.zh: 电动滑板车帮我们少走了很长一段路到登机口。

example.en: The scooter rental shop opens at nine.
example.zh: 滑板车租赁店九点开门。

senses.meaning: 沿轨道行驶的城市公共交通工具

example.en: Take the tram to the museum; it stops nearby.
example.zh: 坐有轨电车去博物馆，站就在附近。

senses.meaning: 路面电车线路/车次（口语）

example.en: The next tram comes in five minutes.
example.zh: 下一班有轨电车五分钟后到。

teachingExamples.en: We missed the last tram and walked back.
teachingExamples.zh: 我们错过了末班有轨电车，只好走回去。

teachingExamples.en: Buy a day pass for bus and tram travel.
teachingExamples.zh: 买一张公交车和有轨电车通用的一日票。

example.en: Meet me at the tram stop by the river.
example.zh: 在河边那个电车站见。

example.en: We ran to catch the tram before it left.
example.zh: 我们跑着才赶上车开前的有轨电车。

senses.meaning: 由钢缆牵引、沿陡坡运行的车厢（山地景区）

example.en: The cable car climbs slowly up the steep hill.
example.zh: 缆车沿着陡坡缓缓上升。

senses.meaning: 城市用缆索牵引的区间车（如旧金山）

example.en: A historic cable car runs through downtown here.
example.zh: 这里有一列复古缆索车穿过市中心。

teachingExamples.en: Book a cable car ticket online to skip the long line.
teachingExamples.zh: 网上买缆车票可以少排长队。

teachingExamples.en: The view from the cable car is worth the wait.
teachingExamples.zh: 缆车上的风景值得排队等候。

example.en: Follow signs to the cable car station on the square.
example.zh: 跟着指示牌去广场旁的缆车站。

example.en: We bought a round-trip cable car pass for the summit.
example.zh: 我们买了去山顶的缆车往返票。

senses.meaning: 威尼斯狭长的平底游船

example.en: A short gondola ride costs more at sunset.
example.zh: 日落时分坐贡多拉贵一些。

example.en: The ski gondola closes when the wind is too strong.
example.zh: 风太大时滑雪吊厢会停运。

teachingExamples.en: Share a gondola with strangers to save money.
teachingExamples.zh: 和别人拼一艘贡多拉可以省钱。

teachingExamples.en: The mountain gondola swayed slightly in the breeze.
teachingExamples.zh: 山间吊厢在微风里微微晃动。

example.en: We booked a quiet gondola ride before dinner.
example.zh: 我们晚餐前订了一次安静的贡多拉游览。

example.en: The cable gondola lifted us above the pine forest.
example.zh: 缆线吊厢把我们升过松树林上方。

relatedWords.meaning: 缆车（与水上贡多拉不同）

senses.meaning: 由车夫拖拉或蹬踏的载客小车（旅游点特色交通）

example.en: A rickshaw tour shows narrow lanes you cannot drive.
example.zh: 人力车游能去汽车进不去的窄巷。

senses.meaning: 机动或电动三轮车版（auto-rickshaw 类）

example.en: Negotiate the fare before you get in the rickshaw.
example.zh: 上人力车前先谈好车资。

teachingExamples.en: The old quarter still has a few rickshaw stands.
teachingExamples.zh: 老城区还有几处人力车站点。

teachingExamples.en: We tipped the rickshaw puller for the steep hill.
teachingExamples.zh: 上坡很陡，我们多给了车夫一点小费。

example.en: A cycle rickshaw took us to the night market gate.
example.zh: 一辆脚踏人力车把我们拉到夜市门口。

example.en: Ask your hotel about a fair rickshaw fare.
example.zh: 向酒店打听合理的人力车车价。

senses.meaning: 旋翼飞行器（观光、救援、短途接驳）

example.en: A helicopter tour flies over the glaciers in ten minutes.
example.zh: 直升机观光十分钟就掠过冰川上空。

senses.meaning: 直升机航程/班次（集合名词用法）

example.en: Bad weather can cancel every helicopter for the day.
example.zh: 坏天气可能让所有直升机全天停飞。

teachingExamples.en: The resort offers a helicopter shuttle to the airport.
teachingExamples.zh: 度假村提供去机场的直升机接驳。

teachingExamples.en: Ear protection is required near a loud helicopter pad.
teachingExamples.zh: 在嘈杂的直升机起降点旁要戴护耳。

example.en: We splurged on a short helicopter ride at dawn.
example.zh: 我们破费订了黎明时分的短途直升机体验。

example.en: A search-and-rescue helicopter passed over the trail.
example.zh: 一架搜救直升机从小径上空飞过。

senses.meaning: 酒店/机场等定点接驳的短程巴士或面包车

example.en: The free hotel shuttle meets you outside baggage claim.
example.zh: 免费酒店班车在行李提取厅外接你。

senses.meaning: 频繁往返两点之间的交通服务

example.en: A park shuttle runs every fifteen minutes all day.
example.zh: 园区班车全天每十五分钟一班。

teachingExamples.en: Please board the airport shuttle at bay seven.
teachingExamples.zh: 请在七号月台搭乘机场班车。

teachingExamples.en: The cruise port shuttle drops us near the terminal.
teachingExamples.zh: 邮轮港班车把我们放在航站楼附近。

example.en: Reserve the airport shuttle one day ahead online.
example.zh: 提前一天在网上预约机场接驳车。

example.en: Follow the green signs to the shuttle bus stop.
example.zh: 跟着绿色指示牌去穿梭巴士站。

example.en: Drivers must yield to pedestrians at this crossing.
example.zh: 在这个路口司机必须礼让行人。

senses.meaning: 仅供步行者使用的（作定语，此处义项用名词义为主；补充常见旅行提示）

example.en: This old bridge is now for pedestrians only.
example.zh: 这座老桥现在只供步行。

teachingExamples.en: Crowded streets confuse tourists and local pedestrians.
teachingExamples.zh: 拥挤的街道让游客和当地行人都容易晕头转向。

teachingExamples.en: Stay visible at night if you walk as a pedestrian.
teachingExamples.zh: 夜间步行要尽量让车辆看见你。

example.en: Cars cannot enter the downtown pedestrian zone.
example.zh: 汽车不能进入市中心步行街区域。

example.en: The tour guide reminded us about pedestrian safety.
example.zh: 导游再次提醒大家注意行人安全。

senses.meaning: 划有标线供行人过街的路段（美式常用）

example.en: Wait for the light before you step into the crosswalk.
example.zh: 等绿灯再过人行横道。

senses.meaning: 与 zebra crossing 同场景（跨文化旅行提示）

example.en: Use the marked crosswalk instead of darting between cars.
example.zh: 走划线的人行横道，别在车缝里乱穿。

teachingExamples.en: The hostel sits just past the main crosswalk.
teachingExamples.zh: 旅舍就在主路人行横道过去一点。

teachingExamples.en: Snow almost hid the crosswalk lines this morning.
teachingExamples.zh: 今早积雪几乎盖住了人行横道的线。

example.en: Always use a marked crosswalk after dark abroad.
example.zh: 在国外天黑后务必走有标线的人行横道。

example.en: The crosswalk signal flashes when it is safe to go.
example.zh: 人行信号灯闪动时表示可以通行。

chapters.title: 问路导航
chapters.scenario: 迷路了不要慌，学会问路和看地图。

example.en: Can you show me the right direction?
example.zh: 你能告诉我正确的方向吗？

example.en: I wrote the direction on my map.
example.zh: 我把路线指示写在地图上了。

teachingExamples.en: Excuse me, what direction is the station?
teachingExamples.zh: 打扰了，车站在什么方向？

teachingExamples.en: We walked in the wrong direction.
teachingExamples.zh: 我们朝错误的方向走了。

example.en: Let's ask for directions at the shop.
example.zh: 我们去商店问路吧。

example.en: This sign points in the right direction.
example.zh: 这个路牌指向正确方向。

example.en: Turn left at the traffic light.
example.zh: 在红绿灯处左转。

example.en: The bank is on your left.
example.zh: 银行在你的左边。

teachingExamples.en: Keep left and walk two blocks.
teachingExamples.zh: 靠左走两个街区。

teachingExamples.en: Take the first left after the bridge.
teachingExamples.zh: 过桥后走第一个左转。

example.en: Turn left when you see the post office.
example.zh: 看到邮局时左转。

example.en: The subway entrance is on your left.
example.zh: 地铁入口在你左边。

example.en: Turn right at the next corner.
example.zh: 在下一个拐角右转。

example.en: Yes, this is the right road.
example.zh: 是的，这条路是对的。

teachingExamples.en: Go right after the bus stop.
teachingExamples.zh: 过了公交站后向右走。

teachingExamples.en: The museum is on the right side.
teachingExamples.zh: 博物馆在右侧。

example.en: Turn right and you will see the hotel.
example.zh: 右转后你就会看到酒店。

example.en: The pharmacy is on the right.
example.zh: 药店在右边。

example.en: Go straight for five minutes.
example.zh: 直走五分钟。

example.en: This is a straight road.
example.zh: 这是一条笔直的路。

teachingExamples.en: Walk straight until you see the bridge.
teachingExamples.zh: 一直直走到你看到桥。

teachingExamples.en: Keep straight, then cross the street.
teachingExamples.zh: 一直往前，然后过马路。

example.en: Go straight and the park is ahead.
example.zh: 直走，公园就在前方。

example.en: The station is straight ahead.
example.zh: 车站就在正前方。

example.en: Turn at the second intersection.
example.zh: 在第二个路口转弯。

example.en: Miss this turn and you get lost.
example.zh: 错过这个转弯你就会迷路。

teachingExamples.en: Turn right after the bookstore.
teachingExamples.zh: 经过书店后右转。

teachingExamples.en: When should I turn for the station?
teachingExamples.zh: 我该在哪里转向去车站？

example.en: Turn around if this road is blocked.
example.zh: 如果这条路被堵住就掉头。

example.en: Take a turn near the coffee shop.
example.zh: 在咖啡店附近拐弯。

senses.meaning: 街道相交形成的拐角处

example.en: The cafe is on the corner.
example.zh: 咖啡馆就在拐角处。

example.en: A map stands in that corner.
example.zh: 那边角落放着一张地图。

teachingExamples.en: Turn left at the corner store.
teachingExamples.zh: 在街角商店处左转。

teachingExamples.en: Wait for me at the next corner.
teachingExamples.zh: 在下一个拐角等我。

example.en: The bus stop is around the corner.
example.zh: 公交站就在拐角附近。

example.en: There is a bakery on the corner.
example.zh: 街角有一家面包店。

senses.meaning: 城市道路之间的一个街区

example.en: Walk two blocks to the station.
example.zh: 走两个街区到车站。

example.en: A truck blocks the narrow road.
example.zh: 一辆卡车挡住了这条窄路。

teachingExamples.en: The hotel is three blocks away.
teachingExamples.zh: 酒店离这里三个街区。

teachingExamples.en: This street is blocked today.
teachingExamples.zh: 这条街今天被封住了。

example.en: The museum takes up one city block.
example.zh: 这个博物馆占了一个城市街区。

example.en: The bank is just a block away.
example.zh: 银行就只隔一个街区。

senses.meaning: 两条或多条道路交汇处

example.en: Turn right at the first intersection.
example.zh: 在第一个十字路口右转。

example.en: Our routes meet at that intersection.
example.zh: 我们的路线在那个路口相交。

teachingExamples.en: There is a traffic light at this intersection.
teachingExamples.zh: 这个路口有红绿灯。

teachingExamples.en: Cross the intersection and go straight.
teachingExamples.zh: 穿过路口然后直走。

example.en: Meet me at the intersection near the mall.
example.zh: 在商场附近的路口和我碰面。

example.en: Be careful at this busy intersection.
example.zh: 经过这个繁忙路口要小心。

senses.meaning: 显眼建筑或地点，用于认路

example.en: The clock tower is a local landmark.
example.zh: 钟楼是当地地标。

example.en: Use that bridge as a landmark.
example.zh: 把那座桥当作路标参照。

teachingExamples.en: Is there a landmark near your hotel?
teachingExamples.zh: 你酒店附近有地标吗？

teachingExamples.en: I found the street by a big landmark.
teachingExamples.zh: 我靠一个大地标找到了这条街。

example.en: The old church is a local landmark.
example.zh: 那座老教堂是当地地标。

example.en: Use the red tower as a landmark.
example.zh: 把红色高塔当作地标。

example.en: The distance is about two kilometers.
example.zh: 距离大约两公里。

example.en: It's a short distance from here.
example.zh: 从这里过去路程不远。

teachingExamples.en: What is the distance to the station?
teachingExamples.zh: 到车站有多远？

teachingExamples.en: We can walk this distance in ten minutes.
teachingExamples.zh: 这段距离我们十分钟能走到。

example.en: This is a long distance to walk.
example.zh: 这段路走起来距离很长。

example.en: The station is within walking distance.
example.zh: 车站步行就能到。

example.en: The station is north of the bank.
example.zh: 车站在银行北边。

example.en: Walk north for two blocks.
example.zh: 向北走两个街区。

teachingExamples.en: Go north and turn left at the light.
teachingExamples.zh: 向北走，在红绿灯处左转。

teachingExamples.en: Is this road to the north gate?
teachingExamples.zh: 这条路是去北门的吗？

example.en: The station is north of the museum.
example.zh: 车站在博物馆北边。

example.en: Head north and you will see the bridge.
example.zh: 向北走，你会看到那座桥。

example.en: The museum is south of the river.
example.zh: 博物馆在河的南边。

example.en: Head south after the traffic lights.
example.zh: 过了红绿灯后向南走。

teachingExamples.en: We are on the south side of town.
teachingExamples.zh: 我们在城镇的南边。

teachingExamples.en: Go south to find the bus terminal.
teachingExamples.zh: 向南走就能找到公交总站。

example.en: The hotel is south of the square.
example.zh: 酒店在广场南边。

example.en: Go south to reach the main road.
example.zh: 向南走就到主路。

example.en: The park is east of the hotel.
example.zh: 公园在酒店东边。

example.en: Drive east for five minutes.
example.zh: 向东开五分钟。

teachingExamples.en: Which road goes east to the station?
teachingExamples.zh: 哪条路向东去车站？

teachingExamples.en: The sun rises in the east.
teachingExamples.zh: 太阳从东方升起。

example.en: The library is east of the school.
example.zh: 图书馆在学校东边。

example.en: Go east for one block.
example.zh: 向东走一个街区。

example.en: The bank is west of the post office.
example.zh: 银行在邮局西边。

example.en: Walk west until you see a bridge.
example.zh: 向西走，直到你看到一座桥。

teachingExamples.en: Go west and cross the first street.
teachingExamples.zh: 向西走，穿过第一条街。

teachingExamples.en: Is the mall on the west side?
teachingExamples.zh: 商场在西侧吗？

example.en: The market is west of the station.
example.zh: 市场在车站西边。

example.en: Head west and turn at the bank.
example.zh: 向西走，到银行处转弯。

example.en: The pharmacy is near the subway exit.
example.zh: 药店在地铁出口附近。

example.en: This is the near entrance to the mall.
example.zh: 这是商场较近的入口。

teachingExamples.en: Is there a cafe near here?
teachingExamples.zh: 这附近有咖啡店吗？

teachingExamples.en: The bus stop is near the corner.
teachingExamples.zh: 公交站在拐角附近。

example.en: Is there a subway station near here?
example.zh: 这附近有地铁站吗？

example.en: Stay near to the main street.
example.zh: 靠近主街走。

example.en: The train station is far from here.
example.zh: 火车站离这里很远。

example.en: That far building is the city hall.
example.zh: 那栋远处的楼是市政厅。

teachingExamples.en: Is it far to the old town?
teachingExamples.zh: 去老城区远吗？

teachingExamples.en: Don't walk, it's too far.
teachingExamples.zh: 别走路了，太远了。

example.en: The station is far from this park.
example.zh: 车站离这个公园很远。

example.en: The museum is too far to walk.
example.zh: 博物馆太远，走路去不了。

example.en: The bookstore is opposite the bus stop.
example.zh: 书店在公交站对面。

example.en: Use the opposite entrance on that street.
example.zh: 走那条街对面的入口。

teachingExamples.en: My hotel is opposite the museum.
teachingExamples.zh: 我的酒店在博物馆对面。

teachingExamples.en: Stand on the opposite side of the road.
teachingExamples.zh: 站到马路对面去。

example.en: The cafe is opposite to the bank.
example.zh: 咖啡店在银行对面。

example.en: Cross to the opposite side of the street.
example.zh: 过到街道对面那一侧。

relatedWords.meaning: 邻近的（易与 beside 混淆）

example.en: There is a map beside the ticket machine.
example.zh: 售票机旁边有一张地图。

example.en: Sit beside me and check the route.
example.zh: 坐我旁边一起看路线。

teachingExamples.en: The bank is beside a small bakery.
teachingExamples.zh: 银行在一家小面包店旁边。

teachingExamples.en: Wait beside the blue sign.
teachingExamples.zh: 在蓝色标志牌旁边等。

example.en: Please stand beside me to check the map.
example.zh: 请站在我旁边看地图。

example.en: The ATM is right beside the door.
example.zh: 自动取款机就在门边。

example.en: The restroom is behind the cafe.
example.zh: 洗手间在咖啡店后面。

example.en: The parking lot is behind.
example.zh: 停车场在后面。

teachingExamples.en: Go behind the station to find the taxi line.
teachingExamples.zh: 走到车站后面就能看到出租车排队点。

teachingExamples.en: The gate is behind that tall building.
teachingExamples.zh: 大门在那栋高楼后面。

example.en: The bus stop is behind the building.
example.zh: 公交站在那栋楼后面。

example.en: Don't fall behind when we cross the street.
example.zh: 过马路时别掉队。

example.en: The bus stop is in front of the mall.
example.zh: 公交站在商场前面。

example.en: Use the front door of the station.
example.zh: 走车站前门。

teachingExamples.en: Please wait at the front of the line.
teachingExamples.zh: 请在队伍前面等候。

teachingExamples.en: There is a map in front of you.
teachingExamples.zh: 你前面有一张地图。

example.en: The map is in front of the station gate.
example.zh: 地图在车站大门前面。

example.en: Please use the front door of the hotel.
example.zh: 请走酒店前门。

senses.meaning: 城市里两侧有建筑的道路

example.en: Turn left at the next street near the bank.
example.zh: 在银行附近的下一条街左转。

senses.meaning: 街区路段（用于问路定位）

example.en: Our hostel is on a quiet street behind the station.
example.zh: 我们的旅舍在车站后面一条安静的街上。

teachingExamples.en: Cross the street when the light turns green.
teachingExamples.zh: 绿灯亮了再过街。

teachingExamples.en: This street leads directly to the city museum.
teachingExamples.zh: 这条街可以直达城市博物馆。

example.en: Walk along the main street for two blocks.
example.zh: 沿着主街走两个街区。

example.en: The pharmacy is across the street from the hotel.
example.zh: 药店在酒店街对面。

example.en: Take a taxi to Fifth Avenue before rush hour.
example.zh: 高峰前打车去第五大道。

senses.meaning: 两侧常有树木的景观大道

example.en: We walked down the avenue lined with tall trees.
example.zh: 我们沿着两旁高树的大道散步。

teachingExamples.en: The bus stops on the avenue outside city hall.
teachingExamples.zh: 公交车停在市政厅外的大街上。

teachingExamples.en: Go straight along the avenue to reach the bridge.
teachingExamples.zh: 沿着这条大道直走就到桥边。

example.en: The café sits on a beautiful tree-lined avenue.
example.zh: 那家咖啡馆在一条很美的林荫大道上。

example.en: Meet me at the avenue entrance of the square.
example.zh: 在广场的大道入口见我。

senses.meaning: 供车辆和行人通行的路

example.en: This road is closed for repairs until tonight.
example.zh: 这条路因维修封闭到今晚。

example.en: Is this the right road to the old town gate?
example.zh: 去老城门走这条路对吗？

teachingExamples.en: Follow this road and turn right at the tunnel.
teachingExamples.zh: 沿着这条路走，在隧道口右转。

teachingExamples.en: The road gets busy after six in the evening.
teachingExamples.zh: 傍晚六点后这条路会很拥堵。

example.en: Read the road sign before you change direction.
example.zh: 改道前先看路标。

example.en: We are already on the road to the airport.
example.zh: 我们已经在去机场的路上了。

senses.meaning: 道路上供单列车辆行驶的车道

example.en: Keep to the right lane after the traffic light.
example.zh: 过红绿灯后请保持右侧车道。

senses.meaning: 乡间或居民区的狭窄小路

example.en: The guesthouse is at the end of a narrow lane.
example.zh: 民宿在一条窄巷的尽头。

teachingExamples.en: Use the bus lane only if local signs allow it.
teachingExamples.zh: 只有当地标识允许时才可走公交专用道。

teachingExamples.en: That lane leads to the riverside square.
teachingExamples.zh: 那条小路通向河边广场。

example.en: Taxis may use the bus lane in some cities.
example.zh: 有些城市出租车可以走公交专用道。

example.en: Do not stand in the bike lane while checking maps.
example.zh: 看地图时不要站在自行车道上。

senses.meaning: 跨越河流或道路的桥梁

example.en: Walk across the bridge to reach the train station.
example.zh: 过桥就能到火车站。

example.en: The new bridge shortens the trip to downtown.
example.zh: 新桥缩短了去市中心的路程。

teachingExamples.en: The bridge is crowded with tourists at sunset.
teachingExamples.zh: 日落时这座桥上游客很多。

teachingExamples.en: Take photos from the bridge for a city view.
teachingExamples.zh: 在桥上拍照能看到城市全景。

example.en: Cross the bridge and you will see the museum.
example.zh: 过桥后你就会看到博物馆。

example.en: Meet at the bridge entrance at seven tonight.
example.zh: 今晚七点在桥头入口见。

senses.meaning: 穿过山体或地下的通道

example.en: Drive through the tunnel to avoid city traffic.
example.zh: 穿过隧道可以避开市区拥堵。

example.en: The metro tunnel is closed for maintenance tonight.
example.zh: 今晚地铁隧道因维护关闭。

teachingExamples.en: The tunnel entrance is right after the roundabout.
teachingExamples.zh: 隧道入口就在环岛后面。

teachingExamples.en: Signal may drop when you enter the tunnel.
teachingExamples.zh: 进入隧道后信号可能变弱。

example.en: Slow down near the tunnel entrance after rain.
example.zh: 雨后经过隧道入口请减速。

example.en: This road tunnel connects the airport and downtown.
example.zh: 这条公路隧道连接机场和市区。

relatedWords.meaning: 地铁（不一定指隧道本体）

senses.meaning: 城市中心开放式公共广场

example.en: The city square is full of street musicians tonight.
example.zh: 今晚城市广场上有很多街头艺人。

example.en: Our tour starts at Central Square at nine.
example.zh: 我们的行程九点在中央广场开始。

teachingExamples.en: Wait for me by the fountain in the square.
teachingExamples.zh: 在广场喷泉旁等我。

teachingExamples.en: Many buses stop near the main square.
teachingExamples.zh: 很多公交车停在主广场附近。

example.en: The parade passes through the city square every year.
example.zh: 每年游行都会经过城市广场。

example.en: There is a weekend market in the square.
example.zh: 周末广场上有集市。

senses.meaning: 车辆绕中心岛通行的环形路口

example.en: Take the second exit at the roundabout ahead.
example.zh: 前方环岛走第二个出口。

example.en: Traffic was smoother after they rebuilt the roundabout.
example.zh: 重建环岛后交通更顺畅了。

teachingExamples.en: Go around the roundabout and follow signs to downtown.
teachingExamples.zh: 绕过环岛并按指示牌去市中心。

teachingExamples.en: Buses use the outer lane at this busy roundabout.
teachingExamples.zh: 在这个繁忙环岛，公交车走外侧车道。

example.en: Miss that roundabout exit and you add ten minutes.
example.zh: 错过那个环岛出口会多花十分钟。

example.en: Turn right at the roundabout near the hospital.
example.zh: 在医院附近的环岛处右转。

example.en: The café is hidden in a small alley behind the market.
example.zh: 那家咖啡馆藏在市场后面的小巷里。

example.en: Use this alley to save five minutes to the station.
example.zh: 走这条小巷去车站能省五分钟。

teachingExamples.en: That alley is dark, so walk on the main street.
teachingExamples.zh: 那条小巷很暗，还是走主街吧。

teachingExamples.en: A mural in the alley helps us find the hostel.
teachingExamples.zh: 小巷里的壁画帮助我们找到旅舍。

example.en: Delivery vans park in the back alley every morning.
example.zh: 送货车每天早上停在后巷。

example.en: We walked through a narrow alley to reach the temple.
example.zh: 我们穿过一条狭窄小巷到达寺庙。

senses.meaning: 连接城市的高速主干道

example.en: Take the highway if you need to reach the airport fast.
example.zh: 想快点到机场就走高速公路。

example.en: There is a rest area every fifty kilometers on this highway.
example.zh: 这条高速每五十公里有一个服务区。

teachingExamples.en: Avoid the highway toll road during holiday traffic.
teachingExamples.zh: 假期车多时尽量避开这条收费高速。

teachingExamples.en: Our bus leaves the highway near the old bridge.
teachingExamples.zh: 我们的巴士在老桥附近下高速。

example.en: Get off at highway exit 12 for the city center.
example.zh: 去市中心请从高速12号出口下。

example.en: Prepare cash or card for the highway toll.
example.zh: 请准备现金或银行卡支付高速通行费。

senses.meaning: 使用地图或导航应用找到路

example.en: I use my phone to navigate downtown.
example.zh: 我用手机在市中心导航。

senses.meaning: 在复杂道路中判断方向前进

example.en: It is hard to navigate in heavy traffic.
example.zh: 在车流很大时很难判断路线前进。

teachingExamples.en: Can you navigate us to the train station?
teachingExamples.zh: 你能帮我们导航到火车站吗？

teachingExamples.en: This app can navigate without internet.
teachingExamples.zh: 这个应用没网也能导航。

example.en: Please navigate to the nearest subway exit.
example.zh: 请导航到最近的地铁出口。

example.en: The driver can navigate through traffic quickly.
example.zh: 司机能很快在车流中穿行。

senses.meaning: 街道、门牌等完整地点信息

example.en: Please enter the hotel address in the app.
example.zh: 请在应用里输入酒店地址。

senses.meaning: 用于导航或快递定位的地点信息

example.en: I sent you the restaurant address by message.
example.zh: 我把餐厅地址发消息给你了。

teachingExamples.en: The address is near the city museum.
teachingExamples.zh: 这个地址在城市博物馆附近。

teachingExamples.en: Double-check the address before booking a taxi.
teachingExamples.zh: 打车前再确认一下地址。

example.en: The form asks for your home address.
example.zh: 表格要求填写你的家庭住址。

example.en: We arrived late because of a wrong address.
example.zh: 我们因为地址错了所以到晚了。

example.en: Our room is on the tenth floor.
example.zh: 我们的房间在十楼。

example.en: Your map fell on the floor.
example.zh: 你的地图掉在地上了。

teachingExamples.en: Take the elevator to the third floor.
teachingExamples.zh: 坐电梯到三楼。

teachingExamples.en: The food court is on the ground floor.
teachingExamples.zh: 美食广场在一楼。

example.en: The entrance is on the ground floor.
example.zh: 入口在一楼。

example.en: The rooftop bar is on the top floor.
example.zh: 屋顶酒吧在顶楼。

senses.meaning: 在楼层间上下运送人的电梯

example.en: The elevator is next to the lobby desk.
example.zh: 电梯在大堂服务台旁边。

senses.meaning: 商场或酒店内的升降设备

example.en: We waited for the elevator during rush hour.
example.zh: 高峰时段我们在等电梯。

teachingExamples.en: Take the elevator up to floor five.
teachingExamples.zh: 坐电梯上到五楼。

teachingExamples.en: This elevator only goes to even floors.
teachingExamples.zh: 这部电梯只停双数楼层。

example.en: Press the elevator button for floor two.
example.zh: 按下去二楼的电梯按钮。

example.en: Take the elevator instead of the stairs.
example.zh: 别走楼梯了，坐电梯吧。

example.en: Take the escalator to the subway hall.
example.zh: 乘自动扶梯到地铁大厅。

senses.meaning: 商场或车站常见的斜向输送通道

example.en: The escalator is crowded after work.
example.zh: 下班后自动扶梯很拥挤。

teachingExamples.en: Stand on the right side of the escalator.
teachingExamples.zh: 在自动扶梯上请站右侧。

teachingExamples.en: The escalator goes directly to the food floor.
teachingExamples.zh: 这条自动扶梯直达美食层。

example.en: Use the up escalator to reach platform one.
example.zh: 用上行扶梯到一号站台。

example.en: The station plays an escalator safety message.
example.zh: 车站会播放扶梯安全提示。

senses.meaning: 建筑物或场所的进入口

example.en: The entrance is behind the bus stop.
example.zh: 入口在公交站后面。

senses.meaning: 景点或商场的主入口区域

example.en: Meet me at the main entrance at noon.
example.zh: 中午在主入口见我。

teachingExamples.en: We found the entrance near the parking lot.
teachingExamples.zh: 我们在停车场附近找到了入口。

teachingExamples.en: Please line up at the side entrance.
teachingExamples.zh: 请在侧门入口排队。

example.en: Security checks bags at the main entrance.
example.zh: 安保在主入口检查行李。

example.en: The museum entrance fee is ten dollars.
example.zh: 博物馆入场费是十美元。

senses.meaning: 离开建筑物或场所的通道

example.en: Follow the green sign to the exit.
example.zh: 跟着绿色标志走到出口。

senses.meaning: 地铁或高速路编号出口

example.en: Take exit B for the shopping street.
example.zh: 去购物街请走 B 出口。

teachingExamples.en: The emergency exit is on your left.
teachingExamples.zh: 紧急出口在你的左边。

teachingExamples.en: We missed the highway exit by mistake.
teachingExamples.zh: 我们不小心错过了高速出口。

example.en: Keep the emergency exit clear at all times.
example.zh: 请始终保持紧急出口畅通。

example.en: The exit sign is above the glass door.
example.zh: 出口标志在玻璃门上方。

senses.meaning: 写有方向或信息的标识牌

example.en: The sign points to the train station.
example.zh: 这个指示牌指向火车站。

example.en: Read the warning sign before crossing.
example.zh: 过马路前先看警示牌。

teachingExamples.en: I cannot see the street sign at night.
teachingExamples.zh: 晚上我看不清路牌。

teachingExamples.en: That blue sign marks the bus route.
teachingExamples.zh: 那个蓝色标志标明了公交路线。

example.en: The street sign says Oak Avenue.
example.zh: 路牌上写着橡树大道。

example.en: Watch every traffic sign when you drive abroad.
example.zh: 在国外开车时要注意每个交通标志。

example.en: Open the map before we leave the hotel.
example.zh: 离开酒店前先打开地图。

senses.meaning: 手机导航应用中的地图页面

example.en: The map shows a faster route to the museum.
example.zh: 地图显示了去博物馆更快的路线。

teachingExamples.en: Can you share the map with me?
teachingExamples.zh: 你能把地图分享给我吗？

teachingExamples.en: This paper map is useful without battery.
teachingExamples.zh: 这张纸质地图没电时也很好用。

example.en: The visitor center offers a free city map.
example.zh: 游客中心提供免费城市地图。

example.en: My map app works well in this country.
example.zh: 我的地图应用在这个国家很好用。

relatedWords.meaning: 无方向信息的（反义概念）

senses.meaning: 从起点到终点的行进路线

example.en: This route avoids the evening traffic jam.
example.zh: 这条路线能避开晚高峰堵车。

example.en: The app gives a bus route to the airport.
example.zh: 应用给出了去机场的公交路线。

teachingExamples.en: What is the fastest route to the old town?
teachingExamples.zh: 去老城区最快的路线是什么？

teachingExamples.en: We changed route after the road closure.
teachingExamples.zh: 道路封闭后我们改了路线。

example.en: Bus route 12 stops at the central station.
example.zh: 12 路公交会停中央车站。

example.en: We chose the scenic route along the coast.
example.zh: 我们选了沿海的风景路线。

chapters.title: 餐厅用餐
chapters.scenario: 品尝当地美食是旅行的重要部分，学会点菜！

example.en: This restaurant is near our hotel.
example.zh: 这家餐厅在我们酒店附近。

teachingExamples.en: We chose a small restaurant for dinner.
teachingExamples.zh: 我们选了一家小餐厅吃晚饭。

teachingExamples.en: Is this restaurant open now?
teachingExamples.zh: 这家餐厅现在营业吗？

example.en: We had lunch in a family restaurant.
example.zh: 我们在一家家庭餐厅吃了午饭。

example.en: The restaurant menu has pictures.
example.zh: 这家餐厅的菜单有图片。

senses.meaning: 餐厅提供菜品和价格的清单

example.en: Can I see the menu, please?
example.zh: 请给我看一下菜单，好吗？

teachingExamples.en: The menu has many local dishes.
teachingExamples.zh: 这份菜单有很多当地菜。

teachingExamples.en: I read the menu before I order.
teachingExamples.zh: 我点菜前先看菜单。

example.en: The waiter brought the main menu.
example.zh: 服务员拿来了主菜单。

example.en: We picked the set menu for two.
example.zh: 我们选了双人套餐菜单。

senses.meaning: 在餐厅选择并要求提供食物

example.en: I want to order chicken soup.
example.zh: 我想点鸡汤。

teachingExamples.en: We are ready to order now.
teachingExamples.zh: 我们现在可以点餐了。

teachingExamples.en: She ordered a salad and tea.
teachingExamples.zh: 她点了一份沙拉和茶。

example.en: Let's order food before it gets busy.
example.zh: 趁还不忙我们先点餐吧。

example.en: The waiter came to take our order.
example.zh: 服务员过来给我们点单。

senses.meaning: 在餐厅为顾客提供服务的人

example.en: The waiter gave us water first.
example.zh: 服务员先给了我们水。

teachingExamples.en: Excuse me, waiter, can we order?
teachingExamples.zh: 打扰一下，服务员，我们可以点餐吗？

teachingExamples.en: The waiter recommended today's fish.
teachingExamples.zh: 服务员推荐了今天的鱼。

example.en: Please call the waiter for the bill.
example.zh: 请叫服务员来结账。

example.en: A friendly waiter helped us choose dishes.
example.zh: 一位友好的服务员帮我们选了菜。

example.en: I made a reservation for two people.
example.zh: 我预订了两个人的位置。

teachingExamples.en: Do you have a reservation tonight?
teachingExamples.zh: 你今晚有预订吗？

teachingExamples.en: Our reservation is under Lee.
teachingExamples.zh: 我们的预订姓名是 Lee。

example.en: We should make a reservation before dinner time.
example.zh: 晚餐时间前我们应该先预订。

example.en: I need to cancel my reservation for tonight.
example.zh: 我需要取消今晚的预订。

senses.meaning: 餐厅里供客人用餐的桌子或座位

example.en: Can we get a table by the window?
example.zh: 我们可以要一张靠窗的桌位吗？

teachingExamples.en: This table is perfect for four people.
teachingExamples.zh: 这张桌子很适合四个人。

teachingExamples.en: Please clean the table before we sit.
teachingExamples.zh: 我们坐下前请先清理桌面。

example.en: I booked a table for 7 p.m.
example.zh: 我订了晚上七点的桌位。

example.en: Our food will come to table number six.
example.zh: 我们的菜会送到六号桌。

senses.meaning: 餐厅中半封闭的长椅座位区

example.en: We prefer a booth for more space.
example.zh: 我们更想要卡座，空间更大。

teachingExamples.en: A booth near the wall is available.
teachingExamples.zh: 靠墙有一个空卡座。

teachingExamples.en: The kids like sitting in a booth.
teachingExamples.zh: 孩子们喜欢坐卡座。

example.en: Can we have the window booth?
example.zh: 我们可以坐靠窗卡座吗？

example.en: The booth seat is very comfortable.
example.zh: 卡座座位很舒服。

relatedWords.meaning: 普通桌位（不一定是卡座）

example.en: Please pay at the counter.
example.zh: 请在柜台付款。

teachingExamples.en: We ordered drinks at the counter.
teachingExamples.zh: 我们在柜台点了饮料。

teachingExamples.en: Two seats are free at the counter.
teachingExamples.zh: 吧台有两个空位。

example.en: Ask the service counter for a menu.
example.zh: 去服务柜台要一份菜单。

example.en: I sat at a counter seat and ate quickly.
example.zh: 我坐在吧台座位上很快吃完了。

senses.meaning: 自己取食物的用餐形式

example.en: The hotel has a breakfast buffet.
example.zh: 这家酒店有早餐自助餐。

teachingExamples.en: We tried the seafood buffet tonight.
teachingExamples.zh: 今晚我们吃了海鲜自助餐。

teachingExamples.en: The buffet is cheaper at lunch time.
teachingExamples.zh: 午餐时段的自助餐更便宜。

example.en: The buffet line is long now.
example.zh: 现在自助取餐队伍很长。

example.en: We chose an all-you-can-eat buffet.
example.zh: 我们选了无限量自助餐。

senses.meaning: 建议别人选择某道菜或服务

example.en: Can you recommend a local dish?
example.zh: 你可以推荐一道当地菜吗？

teachingExamples.en: The waiter recommended the beef noodles.
teachingExamples.zh: 服务员推荐了牛肉面。

teachingExamples.en: I recommend this restaurant to my friends.
teachingExamples.zh: 我把这家餐厅推荐给朋友。

example.en: I highly recommend the soup here.
example.zh: 我强烈推荐这里的汤。

example.en: She recommended this cafe to us.
example.zh: 她向我们推荐了这家咖啡馆。

relatedWords.meaning: 介绍（不一定是建议选择）

example.en: Could I have a glass of water, please?
example.zh: 请给我一杯水，好吗？

example.en: This restaurant gives free water.
example.zh: 这家餐厅提供免费白水。

teachingExamples.en: Do you want still or sparkling water?
teachingExamples.zh: 你想要无气泡水还是气泡水？

teachingExamples.en: I need some water after this spicy dish.
teachingExamples.zh: 吃了这道辣菜后我需要喝点水。

example.en: I'll start with a glass of water.
example.zh: 我先来一杯水。

example.en: She ordered sparkling water with lemon.
example.zh: 她点了加柠檬的气泡水。

relatedWords.meaning: 葡萄酒（同为饮品但含酒精）

example.en: Can I get orange juice with my meal?
example.zh: 我这份餐可以配橙汁吗？

example.en: The juice here is fresh every morning.
example.zh: 这里的果汁每天早上现做。

teachingExamples.en: I'd like apple juice, no ice.
teachingExamples.zh: 我想要苹果汁，不加冰。

teachingExamples.en: This juice is sweet and cold.
teachingExamples.zh: 这杯果汁又甜又冰。

example.en: He ordered orange juice and a sandwich.
example.zh: 他点了橙汁和三明治。

example.en: This cafe is famous for fresh juice.
example.zh: 这家咖啡馆以鲜榨果汁出名。

example.en: I want a hot coffee after lunch.
example.zh: 午餐后我想喝一杯热咖啡。

senses.meaning: 咖啡店常见的饮品类别

example.en: Their coffee tastes strong but smooth.
example.zh: 他们家的咖啡味道浓但顺口。

teachingExamples.en: Can I have coffee with milk?
teachingExamples.zh: 我可以要一杯加奶的咖啡吗？

teachingExamples.en: She drinks coffee every morning while traveling.
teachingExamples.zh: 她旅行时每天早上都喝咖啡。

example.en: He prefers black coffee with no sugar.
example.zh: 他更喜欢不加糖的黑咖啡。

example.en: I ordered iced coffee because it is hot outside.
example.zh: 外面很热，所以我点了冰咖啡。

relatedWords.meaning: 茶（在点单中常作为替代）

example.en: Do you serve hot tea in this restaurant?
example.zh: 你们这家餐厅有热茶吗？

example.en: I usually order tea after dinner.
example.zh: 我通常在晚餐后点茶。

teachingExamples.en: Green tea is popular in many local cafes.
teachingExamples.zh: 绿茶在很多本地咖啡馆都很受欢迎。

teachingExamples.en: Please bring us one pot of tea.
teachingExamples.zh: 请给我们上一壶茶。

example.en: She ordered green tea with her dessert.
example.zh: 她点了绿茶配甜点。

example.en: Can we share a pot of tea?
example.zh: 我们可以共用一壶茶吗？

example.en: We ordered red wine with the steak.
example.zh: 我们点了红酒配牛排。

senses.meaning: 餐厅酒单中的葡萄酒类别

example.en: This wine is local and very popular.
example.zh: 这款葡萄酒是本地的，很受欢迎。

teachingExamples.en: Do you have white wine by the glass?
teachingExamples.zh: 你们有按杯卖的白葡萄酒吗？

teachingExamples.en: I don't drink wine, so I'll take tea.
teachingExamples.zh: 我不喝葡萄酒，所以我要茶。

example.en: Red wine goes well with this beef dish.
example.zh: 红葡萄酒和这道牛肉很搭。

example.en: She chose white wine with grilled fish.
example.zh: 她点了白葡萄酒配烤鱼。

senses.meaning: 由麦芽发酵制成的酒精饮料

example.en: I'll have a cold beer with the burger.
example.zh: 我要一杯冰啤酒配汉堡。

senses.meaning: 酒吧或餐厅常见的按杯饮品

example.en: This place sells local craft beer.
example.zh: 这家店卖本地精酿啤酒。

teachingExamples.en: Do you want bottled beer or draft beer?
teachingExamples.zh: 你要瓶装啤酒还是生啤？

teachingExamples.en: He ordered one beer and some fries.
teachingExamples.zh: 他点了一杯啤酒和一些薯条。

example.en: The waiter recommended the draft beer here.
example.zh: 服务员推荐这里的生啤。

example.en: He asked for a bottle of beer first.
example.zh: 他先要了一瓶啤酒。

example.en: The kids ordered soda with pizza.
example.zh: 孩子们点了汽水配披萨。

senses.meaning: 餐厅常见的碳酸饮品类别

example.en: This combo includes one small soda.
example.zh: 这个套餐包含一杯小汽水。

teachingExamples.en: Can I get a soda without ice?
teachingExamples.zh: 我可以要一杯不加冰的汽水吗？

teachingExamples.en: She prefers soda to beer at dinner.
teachingExamples.zh: 她晚餐时比起啤酒更喜欢汽水。

example.en: He chose diet soda after checking calories.
example.zh: 他看了热量后选了无糖汽水。

example.en: Please mix the drink with soda water.
example.zh: 请用苏打水调这杯饮料。

senses.meaning: 由水果和奶或酸奶打成的浓饮

example.en: I ordered a mango smoothie after the meal.
example.zh: 饭后我点了一杯芒果果昔。

example.en: This smoothie is thick and very fresh.
example.zh: 这杯果昔很浓稠，而且很新鲜。

teachingExamples.en: Do you have a banana smoothie today?
teachingExamples.zh: 你们今天有香蕉果昔吗？

teachingExamples.en: She picked a smoothie instead of soda.
teachingExamples.zh: 她选了果昔而不是汽水。

example.en: This cafe makes a great fruit smoothie.
example.zh: 这家咖啡馆做的水果果昔很棒。

example.en: I want a banana smoothie with no sugar.
example.zh: 我想要一杯不加糖的香蕉果昔。

senses.meaning: 由多种酒或饮料调制的饮品

example.en: He ordered a cocktail before the main dish.
example.zh: 他在主菜前点了一杯鸡尾酒。

senses.meaning: 酒吧菜单中的调酒类别

example.en: This bar has a long cocktail list.
example.zh: 这家酒吧有很长的鸡尾酒单。

teachingExamples.en: Can you recommend a light cocktail?
teachingExamples.zh: 你能推荐一款清爽的鸡尾酒吗？

teachingExamples.en: She asked for a non-alcoholic cocktail.
teachingExamples.zh: 她要了一杯无酒精鸡尾酒。

example.en: Please bring us the cocktail menu.
example.zh: 请给我们拿一下鸡尾酒单。

example.en: I chose a non-alcoholic cocktail tonight.
example.zh: 今晚我选了无酒精鸡尾酒。

senses.meaning: 由柠檬汁和水调成的饮料

example.en: I'd like a cold lemonade with less sugar.
example.zh: 我想要一杯少糖冰柠檬水。

example.en: This lemonade is perfect on a hot day.
example.zh: 这杯柠檬水在热天喝正合适。

teachingExamples.en: Can I get homemade lemonade here?
teachingExamples.zh: 这里有自制柠檬水吗？

teachingExamples.en: He chose lemonade instead of soda.
teachingExamples.zh: 他选了柠檬水而不是汽水。

example.en: Their homemade lemonade is very popular.
example.zh: 他们的自制柠檬水很受欢迎。

example.en: She tried pink lemonade for the first time.
example.zh: 她第一次尝试粉红柠檬水。

relatedWords.meaning: 青柠饮（易与柠檬水混淆）

example.en: I want grilled chicken for dinner.
example.zh: 晚餐我想要烤鸡肉。

senses.meaning: 餐厅菜单中的鸡肉菜品

example.en: This chicken is served with rice.
example.zh: 这份鸡肉配米饭。

teachingExamples.en: Do you have spicy chicken here?
teachingExamples.zh: 你们这里有辣味鸡肉吗？

teachingExamples.en: The chicken soup tastes very fresh.
teachingExamples.zh: 这道鸡汤喝起来很鲜。

example.en: I ordered grilled chicken and a salad.
example.zh: 我点了烤鸡肉和一份沙拉。

example.en: The chicken soup is today's special.
example.zh: 鸡汤是今天的特价菜。

example.en: I'd like beef noodles, please.
example.zh: 请给我一份牛肉面。

example.en: The beef here is very tender.
example.zh: 这里的牛肉很嫩。

teachingExamples.en: Can we share one beef steak?
teachingExamples.zh: 我们可以分着吃一份牛排吗？

teachingExamples.en: This beef dish is a little spicy.
teachingExamples.zh: 这道牛肉菜有点辣。

example.en: He ordered a medium beef steak.
example.zh: 他点了一份五分熟牛排。

example.en: The beef noodles are very popular here.
example.zh: 这里的牛肉面很受欢迎。

example.en: We want sweet and sour pork.
example.zh: 我们想要糖醋猪肉。

senses.meaning: 餐厅中常见的猪肉菜系食材

example.en: This pork is cooked with garlic.
example.zh: 这道猪肉是用蒜做的。

teachingExamples.en: Do you have pork dumplings today?
teachingExamples.zh: 今天有猪肉饺子吗？

teachingExamples.en: I don't eat pork, thank you.
teachingExamples.zh: 我不吃猪肉，谢谢。

example.en: The pork chop comes with mashed potatoes.
example.zh: 这份猪排配土豆泥。

example.en: Sweet and sour pork is my favorite dish.
example.zh: 糖醋里脊是我最喜欢的菜。

example.en: I'd like steamed fish for lunch.
example.zh: 午餐我想要清蒸鱼。

example.en: This fish is fresh from the sea.
example.zh: 这条鱼是当天海捕的。

teachingExamples.en: Do you recommend this fish dish?
teachingExamples.zh: 你推荐这道鱼吗？

teachingExamples.en: My son only eats fish and rice.
teachingExamples.zh: 我儿子只吃鱼和米饭。

example.en: The fried fish is crispy outside.
example.zh: 这份炸鱼外皮很酥脆。

example.en: Can you make this fish dish less salty?
example.zh: 这道鱼菜能做得淡一点吗？

example.en: Can I get garlic shrimp, please?
example.zh: 请给我一份蒜香虾。

example.en: The shrimp pasta is very popular.
example.zh: 虾仁意面很受欢迎。

teachingExamples.en: I am allergic to shrimp.
teachingExamples.zh: 我对虾过敏。

teachingExamples.en: These shrimp are cooked just right.
teachingExamples.zh: 这些虾火候刚好。

example.en: Garlic shrimp goes well with bread.
example.zh: 蒜香虾配面包很合适。

example.en: She ordered shrimp pasta and soup.
example.zh: 她点了虾仁意面和汤。

example.en: I'd like more vegetable dishes.
example.zh: 我想多点一些蔬菜菜品。

senses.meaning: 菜单中清淡或素食菜品原料

example.en: This soup has fresh vegetable in it.
example.zh: 这碗汤里有新鲜蔬菜。

teachingExamples.en: Do you have a mixed vegetable plate?
teachingExamples.zh: 你们有什锦蔬菜拼盘吗？

teachingExamples.en: She always orders one vegetable dish.
teachingExamples.zh: 她总会点一道蔬菜菜。

example.en: Vegetable soup is light and healthy.
example.zh: 蔬菜汤清淡又健康。

example.en: Please bring one mixed vegetable dish.
example.zh: 请来一份什锦蔬菜。

senses.meaning: 由生蔬菜或配料拌成的冷盘

example.en: I'll have a chicken salad, please.
example.zh: 请给我一份鸡肉沙拉。

senses.meaning: 餐前或配餐的小份轻食

example.en: This salad comes before the main dish.
example.zh: 这份沙拉会在主菜前上。

teachingExamples.en: Can I get the salad without onion?
teachingExamples.zh: 这份沙拉可以不要洋葱吗？

teachingExamples.en: The salad dressing is on the side.
teachingExamples.zh: 沙拉酱是另外放的。

example.en: We shared a fruit salad after dinner.
example.zh: 晚餐后我们分着吃了一份水果沙拉。

example.en: This salad dressing tastes a little sour.
example.zh: 这个沙拉酱吃起来有点酸。

senses.meaning: 由食材熬煮而成的液体菜品

example.en: I'd like tomato soup to start.
example.zh: 我想先来一份番茄汤。

senses.meaning: 餐厅中的前菜或配餐汤品

example.en: This soup is served very hot.
example.zh: 这份汤上来时很烫。

teachingExamples.en: Do you have mushroom soup today?
teachingExamples.zh: 今天有蘑菇汤吗？

teachingExamples.en: The soup is too salty for me.
teachingExamples.zh: 这碗汤对我来说太咸了。

example.en: Tomato soup is popular with kids.
example.zh: 番茄汤很受小朋友欢迎。

example.en: Could I have a clean soup spoon?
example.zh: 可以给我一把干净的汤勺吗？

senses.meaning: 用面粉烤制的主食面包

example.en: Can we have more bread, please?
example.zh: 请再给我们一些面包好吗？

example.en: This bread is warm and soft.
example.zh: 这份面包又热又软。

teachingExamples.en: I'd like soup with bread.
teachingExamples.zh: 我想要汤配面包。

teachingExamples.en: Is this bread baked today?
teachingExamples.zh: 这个面包是今天烤的吗？

example.en: Garlic bread is great with pasta.
example.zh: 蒜香面包配意面很棒。

example.en: He only ate a slice of bread.
example.zh: 他只吃了一片面包。

example.en: Let's order dessert after the meal.
example.zh: 我们饭后点个甜点吧。

senses.meaning: 蛋糕、冰淇淋等甜品类别

example.en: This restaurant has great dessert.
example.zh: 这家餐厅的甜点很棒。

teachingExamples.en: What dessert do you recommend?
teachingExamples.zh: 你推荐哪款甜点？

teachingExamples.en: I want dessert but not too sweet.
teachingExamples.zh: 我想吃甜点，但不要太甜。

example.en: Can we see the dessert menu now?
example.zh: 我们现在可以看看甜点菜单吗？

example.en: She picked a chocolate dessert.
example.zh: 她选了一款巧克力甜点。

senses.meaning: 食物味道很辣，带明显辛辣感

example.en: This curry is too spicy for me.
example.zh: 这份咖喱对我来说太辣了。

senses.meaning: 口味偏重，常含辣椒或胡椒

example.en: Do you like spicy street food?
example.zh: 你喜欢辛辣的街头小吃吗？

teachingExamples.en: Can we order something less spicy?
teachingExamples.zh: 我们可以点一点没那么辣的吗？

teachingExamples.en: The soup is spicy but very tasty.
teachingExamples.zh: 这碗汤很辣，但很好吃。

example.en: I can eat spicy food every day.
example.zh: 我每天都能吃辣味食物。

example.en: He asked for extra spicy noodles.
example.zh: 他点了特辣面。

senses.meaning: 食物含糖，尝起来有甜味

example.en: This mango drink is very sweet.
example.zh: 这杯芒果饮料很甜。

example.en: I want a sweet dessert after dinner.
example.zh: 晚饭后我想吃个甜口甜点。

teachingExamples.en: Is this sauce sweet or salty?
teachingExamples.zh: 这个酱是甜的还是咸的？

teachingExamples.en: The cake looks sweet and soft.
teachingExamples.zh: 这个蛋糕看起来又甜又软。

example.en: The tea has a light sweet taste.
example.zh: 这杯茶有淡淡的甜味。

example.en: She has a sweet tooth after meals.
example.zh: 她饭后总爱吃甜食。

senses.meaning: 食物有明显酸味，如柠檬味

example.en: The soup is sour and refreshing.
example.zh: 这道汤酸酸的，很开胃。

senses.meaning: 味道偏酸，常来自醋或发酵

example.en: These pickles are too sour for kids.
example.zh: 这些腌菜对小朋友来说太酸了。

teachingExamples.en: I like sour fish soup in this restaurant.
teachingExamples.zh: 我喜欢这家餐厅的酸味鱼汤。

teachingExamples.en: Can you make it less sour?
teachingExamples.zh: 你们可以做得没那么酸吗？

example.en: This sauce has a strong sour flavor.
example.zh: 这个酱有很明显的酸味。

example.en: We ordered sweet and sour chicken.
example.zh: 我们点了糖醋鸡。

senses.meaning: 食物含盐较多，吃起来偏咸

example.en: These fries are a little salty.
example.zh: 这些薯条有点咸。

senses.meaning: 重口味咸香，常见于酱料或零食

example.en: The grilled fish is salty and smoky.
example.zh: 这条烤鱼咸香又有烟熏味。

teachingExamples.en: Could you make the soup less salty?
teachingExamples.zh: 这碗汤可以少放点盐吗？
